    # Initialize visited and path dictionaries
    visited = [start]
    path = [start]

    # Find the shortest path
    while start != end:
        for neighbor, weight in graph[start]:

                visited.append(neighbor)
                path.append(neighbor)
                start = neighbor
                break

    # Return the path
    return path
